original_client_text.markup_text:
Blueberry Banana Cheesecake 🫐🍰
Ingredients 🛒
* 3 bananas 🍌
* 3 eggs 🥚
* Greek yogurt 🥣
* 2 tbsp honey 🍯
* Fresh blueberries 🫐
Steps 👩‍🍳
1. Mash bananas until smooth 🍌
2. Add eggs, Greek yogurt, and honey, mix well 🥣
3. Pour into a baking dish 🧁
4. Top with fresh blueberries 🫐
5. Bake at 180°C 350°F until set and lightly golden 🔥#healthydessert #foodtok #lowsugar #easycooking
